articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization

articles.takeaway: Optimizing airline, airport, and flight operations through advanced technologies is critical to accommodate rising air traffic while meeting environmental sustainability targets.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
